prompt: Studio product photography, overhead flat lay. An amber glass dropper bottle with a matte gold cap, centered on a terracotta clay saucer. Warm sand background with soft textile shadow. Natural light, warm color temperature. Props: three small cream pebbles and a dried chamomile flower. No text, no logos, no people. Earthy, artisanal mood. Avoid: bright white studio look, clutter, watermarks, harsh shadows, stock photo cliches.
